text_raw: Lord Middler, where have you gone...
text_clean: Lord Middler, where have you gone...

text_raw: I speak of Williem Middler, the second son of House Middler.
text_clean: I speak of Williem Middler, the second son of House Middler.

text_raw: It's been days now...
text_clean: It's been days now...

text_raw: Lieutenant, the Greymane...
text_clean: Lieutenant, the Greymane...

text_raw: Lieutenant, the search parties have turned up nothing.
text_clean: Lieutenant, the search parties have turned up nothing.

text_raw: I fear... he may already have fallen to that monster.
text_clean: I fear... he may already have fallen to that monster.

text_raw: I see. Leave us.
text_clean: I see. Leave us.

text_raw: I serve as lieutenant to Sir Williem.
text_clean: I serve as lieutenant to Sir Williem.

text_raw: There's a madman near the ruins, butchering anyone he encounters.
text_clean: There's a madman near the ruins, butchering anyone he encounters.

text_raw: Lord Williem was determined to hunt him down.
text_clean: Lord Williem was determined to hunt him down.

text_raw: I urged him to wait, but he vanished during patrol.
text_clean: I urged him to wait, but he vanished during patrol.

text_raw: It's a damned mess, what with the marshal away as well.
text_clean: It's a damned mess, what with the marshal away as well.

text_raw: Would you aid in the search, Greymane?
text_clean: Would you aid in the search, Greymane?

text_raw: We'll be right behind you.
text_clean: We'll be right behind you.

text_raw: Is Marshal Middler missing?
text_clean: Is Marshal Middler missing?

text_raw: What's going on?
text_clean: What's going on?

text_raw: Push harder! Yeah, that's it!
text_clean: Push harder! Yeah, that's it!

text_raw: Hah!
text_clean: Hah!

text_raw: What did you say?
text_clean: What did you say?

text_raw: This bastard's sniffing around for those little shits from earlier!
text_clean: This bastard's sniffing around for those little shits from earlier!

text_raw: Do you know how much trouble they've caused us?!
text_clean: Do you know how much trouble they've caused us?!

text_raw: You stinking rat!
text_clean: You stinking rat!

text_raw: Those whining guards with no fight in 'em?!
text_clean: Those whining guards with no fight in 'em?!

text_raw: Die!
text_clean: Die!

text_raw: Alright, I yield! You win, damn it!
text_clean: Alright, I yield! You win, damn it!

text_raw: You alright?
text_clean: You alright?

text_raw: Yeah! Sure as hell did!
text_clean: Yeah! Sure as hell did!

text_raw: They were talking about bringing honor to House Middler.
text_clean: They were talking about bringing honor to House Middler.

text_raw: Headed straight up to the ruins. That's all I know!
text_clean: Headed straight up to the ruins. That's all I know!

text_raw: Hold steady!
text_clean: Hold steady!

text_raw: Die, you bastard!
text_clean: Die, you bastard!

text_raw: Just like that!
text_clean: Just like that!

text_raw: Why don't you just fuck off while we're still being nice!
text_clean: Why don't you just fuck off while we're still being nice!

text_raw: No more! I surrender!
text_clean: No more! I surrender!

text_raw: You seen any soldiers pass through here?
text_clean: You seen any soldiers pass through here?

text_raw: Are you sure you saw Hernandian soldiers?
text_clean: Are you sure you saw Hernandian soldiers?

text_raw: You...
text_clean: You...

text_raw: Th-thank you...
text_clean: Th-thank you...

text_raw: Quickly... We must defeat...
text_clean: Quickly... We must defeat...

text_raw: People... soldiers... are being slaughtered...
text_clean: People... soldiers... are being slaughtered...

text_raw: Please... help me...
text_clean: Please... help me...

text_raw: Careful, up you get.
text_clean: Careful, up you get.

text_raw: You're in bad shape.
text_clean: You're in bad shape.

text_raw: I'll handle it.
text_clean: I'll handle it.

text_raw: This is who will protect us from the Staglord.
text_clean: This is who will protect us from the Staglord.

text_raw: And you came all this way just to pray?
text_clean: And you came all this way just to pray?

text_raw: May he find peace where he rests...
text_clean: May he find peace where he rests...

text_raw: Come to think of it, there's a rumor the {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_DeerKing:Title#Staglord} still lives!
text_clean: Come to think of it, there's a rumor the {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_DeerKing:Title#Staglord} still lives!

text_raw: If not for him, we'd all be dead.
text_clean: If not for him, we'd all be dead.

text_raw: Don't worry, I'm sure he will.
text_clean: Don't worry, I'm sure he will.

text_raw: How could that be true?
text_clean: How could that be true?

text_raw: Yeah, come on. Let's head back down.
text_clean: Yeah, come on. Let's head back down.

text_raw: You know, there's a secret in these parts.
text_clean: You know, there's a secret in these parts.

text_raw: It's really something, isn't it?
text_clean: It's really something, isn't it?

text_raw: Quiet! Hush!
text_clean: Quiet! Hush!

text_raw: Lads, I'll go ahead and scout things out,
text_clean: Lads, I'll go ahead and scout things out,

text_raw: while you bring a wagon to carry all the treasure.
text_clean: while you bring a wagon to carry all the treasure.

text_raw: Course I know about the secret.
text_clean: Course I know about the secret.

text_raw: Hmm...
text_clean: Hmm...

text_raw: They say there's treasure buried somewhere near here.
text_clean: They say there's treasure buried somewhere near here.

text_raw: Somewhere near a stone lantern...
text_clean: Somewhere near a stone lantern...

text_raw: From what I hear, enough gold to live easy for twenty years.
text_clean: From what I hear, enough gold to live easy for twenty years.

text_raw: Relax. Treasure ain't going anywhere.
text_clean: Relax. Treasure ain't going anywhere.

text_raw: Right, got it.
text_clean: Right, got it.

text_raw: Let's meet again when it gets dark.
text_clean: Let's meet again when it gets dark.

text_raw: What... what secret?
text_clean: What... what secret?

text_raw: Well, what is it?
text_clean: Well, what is it?

text_raw: Hmm, around here?
text_clean: Hmm, around here?

text_raw: So what we standing around here for then?
text_clean: So what we standing around here for then?

text_raw: No time to waste, then.
text_clean: No time to waste, then.

text_raw: I was thinking the same.
text_clean: I was thinking the same.

text_raw: My thoughts exactly.
text_clean: My thoughts exactly.

text_raw: Right then... Let's go and see for ourselves.
text_clean: Right then... Let's go and see for ourselves.

text_raw: I think we ought to light the lantern at the grave, you know?
text_clean: I think we ought to light the lantern at the grave, you know?

text_raw: Aye, without its light, the place feels... I don't know... ominous.
text_clean: Aye, without its light, the place feels... I don't know... ominous.

text_raw: Almost like the being watching over us is... well, it's weakening...
text_clean: Almost like the being watching over us is... well, it's weakening...

text_raw: Aye. Y-you can see the graves just up ahead, can't you?
text_clean: Aye. Y-you can see the graves just up ahead, can't you?

text_raw: Greymane, Greymane!
text_clean: Greymane, Greymane!

text_raw: Greymane! I must speak with you.
text_clean: Greymane! I must speak with you.

text_raw: I lost my husband to that fiend.
text_clean: I lost my husband to that fiend.

text_raw: It happened too suddenly, I still struggle to believe it.
text_clean: It happened too suddenly, I still struggle to believe it.

text_raw: I must know... The Staglord's end, it was not peaceful, was it?
text_clean: I must know... The Staglord's end, it was not peaceful, was it?

text_raw: I see.. hearing that lightens my heart.
text_clean: I see.. hearing that lightens my heart.

text_raw: And the heavy burden on my shoulders has finally lifted.
text_clean: And the heavy burden on my shoulders has finally lifted.

text_raw: Please accept this, my parting gift of gratitude.
text_clean: Please accept this, my parting gift of gratitude.

text_raw: I have no use for it now...
text_clean: I have no use for it now...

text_raw: At last, we meet...
text_clean: At last, we meet...

text_raw: I searched for a long time to find the one who brought down the Staglord.
text_clean: I searched for a long time to find the one who brought down the Staglord.

text_raw: Now that I have, I can finally tell you what's been weighing on my mind.
text_clean: Now that I have, I can finally tell you what's been weighing on my mind.

text_raw: Greymane, there's something I've been wishing to tell you.
text_clean: Greymane, there's something I've been wishing to tell you.

text_raw: It was not peaceful.
text_clean: It was not peaceful.

text_raw: Another scavenger, here to pick at the bones of my kingdom.
text_clean: Another scavenger, here to pick at the bones of my kingdom.

text_raw: A petty thief has but one fate...
text_clean: A petty thief has but one fate...

text_raw: Death, cold and swift and merciless.
text_clean: Death, cold and swift and merciless.

text_raw: Come forth.
text_clean: Come forth.

text_raw: I shall slay you myself.
text_clean: I shall slay you myself.

text_raw: No... This cannot be...
text_clean: No... This cannot be...

text_raw: Ah... Do not weep for me, my subjects...
text_clean: Ah... Do not weep for me, my subjects...

text_raw: Have no fear.
text_clean: Have no fear.

text_raw: I shall not fade.
text_clean: I shall not fade.

text_raw: Until I build our glorious kingdom... for you...
text_clean: Until I build our glorious kingdom... for you...

text_raw: This affront shall be paid for with your life.
text_clean: This affront shall be paid for with your life.

text_raw: You shall not claim the riches my subjects bled to earn!
text_clean: You shall not claim the riches my subjects bled to earn!

text_raw: Do you not see the crown upon my head?
text_clean: Do you not see the crown upon my head?

text_raw: Do you not hear the chorus of my subjects' praise?
text_clean: Do you not hear the chorus of my subjects' praise?

text_raw: How dare you set your filthy feet upon royal ground!
text_clean: How dare you set your filthy feet upon royal ground!

text_raw: I hereby sentence you to death!
text_clean: I hereby sentence you to death!

text_raw: The price of coveting the royal coffers... is death.
text_clean: The price of coveting the royal coffers... is death.

text_raw: Such is the punishment for treason.
text_clean: Such is the punishment for treason.

text_raw: A king's fury is fiercer than a thousand spears!
text_clean: A king's fury is fiercer than a thousand spears!

text_raw: I'll tear your limbs and hang them above the castle gate!
text_clean: I'll tear your limbs and hang them above the castle gate!

text_raw: Kneel!
text_clean: Kneel!

text_raw: My people thirst for your blood.
text_clean: My people thirst for your blood.

text_raw: I will not die... a king does not die!
text_clean: I will not die... a king does not die!

text_raw: I am the Staglord! King eternal!
text_clean: I am the Staglord! King eternal!

text_raw: I will witness your end from atop my throne!
text_clean: I will witness your end from atop my throne!

text_raw: It's time for me to take your life.
text_clean: It's time for me to take your life.

text_raw: Sleep now, in everlasting night!
text_clean: Sleep now, in everlasting night!

text_raw: Persistent wretch!
text_clean: Persistent wretch!

text_raw: Mangy cur...!
text_clean: Mangy cur...!
